directions.note: right-facing produced by horizontal flip unless the character has handedness-specific gear

gen_strategy_note: Per top_down_character canary findings: grid-prompting does not produce animation phases. Each frame is its own ERNIE call with an explicit pose_description.

poses: both feet planted flat, arms at sides, neutral breathing pose, head level
both feet planted flat, chest subtly expanded, shoulders slightly raised
both feet planted flat, slight forward lean, arms relaxed
both feet planted flat, chest subtly expanded, shoulders slightly raised (peak breath)
both feet planted flat, neutral posture returning
both feet planted flat, arms at sides, matching pose 0
right foot lifted, knee at 25° and rising, left foot planted, arm swing opposite
right foot at apex of step, knee at 45°, body slightly crouched, arms swinging
right foot descending toward ground ahead of body, torso level
right foot planted ahead, left foot pushing off behind, weight shifting forward
left foot lifted, knee at 25° and rising, right foot planted ahead
left foot at apex of step, knee at 45°, body slightly crouched
left foot descending toward ground, torso level
left foot planted ahead, right foot pushing off behind
forward-leaning sprint, right knee high at chest level, left leg fully extended behind
forward-leaning sprint, right foot stretching forward, left foot leaving ground
forward-leaning sprint, right foot striking ground ahead, left knee rising
forward-leaning sprint, push-off with right foot, left knee at chest
forward-leaning sprint, left knee high at chest level, right leg fully extended behind
forward-leaning sprint, left foot stretching forward, right foot leaving ground
forward-leaning sprint, left foot striking ground ahead, right knee rising
forward-leaning sprint, push-off with left foot, right knee at chest
crouched preparation, knees bent deeply, arms drawn back
explosive takeoff, legs extending, arms thrusting upward
rising through air, body fully extended vertically, arms raised
apex of jump, body compressed, legs tucked, arms at sides, floating
falling, legs beginning to extend downward, arms slightly forward for balance
falling fast, legs fully extended downward preparing to land, arms out
feet striking ground, knees absorbing impact, deep crouch
rising from crouch, knees straightening, body returning to neutral
wind-up: weapon arm drawn back, shoulders rotated away from target
anticipation: weight shifting forward, front foot stepping
strike: weapon arm fully extended forward, body rotated into target
follow-through: weapon arm crossing body after strike, shoulders squared
recovery: weapon arm returning to guard position
deep wind-up: weapon raised high overhead, both hands gripping
charging: body coiled, knees bent, weapon beginning downward arc
descent phase one: weapon halfway through downward swing, shoulders rotating
descent phase two: weapon approaching target height, full body commitment
strike: weapon at target height, maximum extension, stance wide
impact follow-through: weapon past target, body leaning forward
recovery swing: weapon continuing through arc to opposite side
recovery stance: weapon being reset to guard, body squaring
impact: head snapped back, chest recoiling, arms thrown out
stagger: body bent backward, knees buckling, arms searching for balance
recovery: body returning to upright, wary guard posture
killing blow: head thrown back, arms flailing outward, body arched
falling: body tilting backward, legs giving way
collapsing: knees hitting ground, upper body still upright
crumpling: body folding forward, arms reaching for ground
on ground: body fully prone, limbs sprawled
still: body motionless on ground, legs bent in final position
pressed against wall with one hand, body facing wall, legs bent
pressed against wall with both hands, body facing wall, legs straighter mid-slide
wind-up: body coiled low, one leg forward, arms tucked
launch: explosive forward motion, body nearly horizontal, trailing afterimage
mid-dash: body fully horizontal, legs streamlined, forward velocity clear
end: body starting to slow, feet reaching for ground, arms coming up
mid-crouch: knees bending, body lowering, arms drawn in
fully crouched: deep squat, heels on ground, body compact
low crouch, right foot forward in small step, body low
low crouch, right foot planted, left foot beginning to move
low crouch, left foot forward in small step, weight shifting
low crouch, left foot planted, right foot beginning to move
low crouch, right foot beginning next step, continuous low profile
low crouch, returning to neutral crouched stance

ernie_call_count.note: right-facing is a horizontal flip so the gen count does not double; total = frame budget
